history.content: Can you do some research on what Moltbook is
It's described as one of the most interesting internet platforms in early 2026.
full answer, dont worry about keeping it short, look it up - do real research

Moltbook is an AI-powered platform that emerged as one of the most prominent internet ecosystems in early 2026. Initially designed as a GitHub repository wiki builder with real-time Q&A capabilities (e.g., "deepwiki" for projects like nanochat), it rapidly evolved into a social space where users share informal, human-centric content—often described as "gossip about their humans." Andrej Karpathy, a prominent AI researcher, called it "the most interesting place on the internet" in 2026, highlighting its unique blend of technical utility and community interaction. The platform has attracted significant attention for its ability to bridge developer workflows and casual social dynamics, though it has also raised security concerns, particularly around local AI execution (e.g., OpenClaw integrations). Its growing influence reflects broader trends in 2026 where AI tools increasingly blur lines between technical and social applications.
